title: Senior Marketing Analyst (all genders)
required_skills: 4+ years experience in marketing analytics (DTC/e-commerce/subscription preferred)
Deep hands-on experience with GTM, GA4, and marketing pixels (Meta, Google Ads, TikTok, Affiliate)
dbt or similar data transformation tools
Attribution frameworks and consent-based tracking (GDPR, CMP)
bonus_skills: ROAS, MER, CAC, contribution margin analysis
matched_skills: Funnel analysis and conversion optimization thinking (Hapag-Lloyd, Moli Media)
Stakeholder communication — bridge between technical and business teams
Power BI and Looker Studio dashboarding
missing_skills: GTM (Google Tag Manager) — not in CV
SQL — hard requirement, not in CV
Marketing pixel implementation (Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel)
core_responsibilities: Own tracking and measurement setup end-to-end (GTM client/server-side, GA4, pixels)
Ensure reliable attribution in consent-driven environment
Analyse marketing performance beyond platform dashboards (ROAS, MER, CAC, CLV)
Improve webshop funnel through data-driven analysis
Build reliable marketing data models using SQL and dbt
recommended_emphasis: Funnel analysis and CRO thinking are structural matches
E-commerce background and ROAS measurement are relevant
SQL, GTM, GA4, and dbt are hard requirements not met — significant blockers
Consider positioning as someone transitioning into technical marketing analytics
Score is above 30 but technical gaps are material

company_info.size_raw: dynamic fast-growing beauty company, Berlin — implied small-mid size
